speaker: charlie
text: Fantastic sporting news for our southern neighbours Jamie - Sydney has secured the 2026 Australian PGA Championship for the first time since 1998! The tournament returns to The Lakes Golf Club in November and it's expected to bring 15,000 visitors and inject over 10 million dollars into the NSW economy.

speaker: alice
text: The Lakes Golf Club has such a rich history too Alex - it last hosted the tournament way back in 1987 but also saw Jack Nicklaus win the 1964 Australian Open there. Sports tourism is absolutely booming right now, growing at 28 percent annually since 2020, which is fantastic for our economy.

speaker: charlie
text: Love seeing major tournaments return to Australian soil. And speaking of legends, Jamie Ding has just won his 30th consecutive game on Jeopardy, making him the fifth-greatest streak in the show's history with total winnings of nearly 850,000 dollars. Not bad for a bureaucrat from New Jersey!
